headline: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Launches Kubernetes Edge AI Appliances With Red Hat And Everpure
summary: Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has launched new Kubernetes Edge AI appliances in collaboration with Red Hat and Everpure. The offering provides a validated, turnkey edge Kubernetes platform aimed at running scalable AI workloads close to where data is generated. The collaboration expands Super Micro Computer's portfolio into edge AI deployments that combine hardware, software and management capabilities. For investors tracking Super Micro Computer, this launch adds another product...
